stacking_oof_method.details: All stacking experiments (Phase 3, 4b, 6, 8, final) use OOF probabilities for meta-training and fold-averaged test probabilities. No in-sample leakage.

threshold_optimization.details: Phase 5 threshold optimization done on OOF predictions (standard practice). Not using nested CV but effect is minimal (0.001 improvement reported).
